dataset.title: Dataset: The influence of seagrass traits and environmental controls on soil organic carbon stocks in Chouy Pros Bay, Cambodia
dataset.abstract: Database of 25 seagrass-associated sediment cores from Chrouy Pros Bay, Gulf of Thailand, Cambodia, collected in 2024. This dataset accompanies the publication ‘The influence of seagrass traits and environmental controls on soil organic carbon stocks in Chouy Pros Bay, Cambodia’ (doi: 10.1016/j.scitotenv.2025.180000). Sediment core information includes organic carbon, inorganic carbon, nitrogen, and phosphorus contents, dry bulk density, and organic carbon stable isotope ratios. Seagrass aboveground biomass, belowground biomass, and shoot density were assessed via three biomass cores from within 10m of the sediment coring location. Field data collection and laboratory methods followed the ‘CariCAS’ protocols, accessible at 10.25148/merc_fac.2024.32
dataset.intellectualRights: This dataset is listed under a Creative Commons BY 4.0 and can be used with attribution. https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

attribute.attributeDefinition: Unique identifier for the study made up of the first author's family name, as well as the second author's family name or et al. if more than three, then publication year separated by underscores.
Numeric site identifier
Alphanumeric site identifier
Latitude
Longitude
Depth class derived from Site names: Deep= Depth>1m, Shallow= Depth<1m
Average number of shoots derived across all biomass cores at a site (typically 3 cores) and normalized to an area of one m2
Standard deviation of shoot densities at site
Average above-ground biomass (dry weight) derived from all biomass cores at a site (typically 3 cores) and normalized to an area of one m2
Standard deviation of above-ground biomass at site
Average below-ground biomass (dry weight) derived from all biomass cores at a site (typically 3 cores) and normalized to an area of one m2
Standard deviation of below-ground biomass at site
Minimum known sediment depth from field measurement with metal stake
Total length of sediment core
Organic carbon stock in core
Organic carbon stock in core normalized to 1m depth
Aboveground seagrass biomass per shoot, average of 3 biomass cores per site
Total seagrass biomass per shoot, average of 3 biomass cores per site
Mean carbon stable isotope ratio of all subcores at a site
Estimated seagrass-derived portion of sedimentary organic carbon, derived from stable carbon istope data using a 2-endmember mixing model (seagrass and mangrove/terrestrial)
Estimated mangrove/terrestrial-derived portion of sedimentary organic carbon, derived from stable carbon istope data using a 2-endmember mixing model (seagrass and mangrove/terrestrial)
Unique identifier for the study made up of the first author's family name, as well as the second author's family name or et al. if more than three, then publication year separated by underscores.
Alphanumeric site identifier
Alphanumeric biomass core identifier
Seagrass species at coring location
Number of seagrass shoots in core
Weight of empty tare
Weight of tare and above-ground biomass sample
Weight of above-ground biomass
Weight of empty tare
Weight of tare and below-ground biomass sample
Weight of below-ground biomass
Number of shoots in core, normalized to an area of one m2
Dry weight of above-ground biomass in core, normalized to an area of one m2
Dry weight of below-ground biomass in core, normalized to an area of one m2
Additional information
Unique identifier for the study made up of the first author's family name, as well as the second author's family name or et al. if more than three, then publication year separated by underscores.
Year of sample collection.
Numeric month of year of sample collection.
Numeric day of month of sample collection.
Alphanumeric site identifier
Minimum known sediment depth from field measurement with metal stake
Latitude at site estimated from map
Longitude at site estimated from map
Seagrass species at coring location
Alphanumeric sample vial identifier
Initial weight of empty vial
Weight of vial with dried sample
Weight of dried sample
Volume of subcore sample
Depth from the sediment surface at which subcore was extracted
Upper boundary of subcore interval
Lower boundary of subcore interval
Thickness of subcore interval
Dry bulk density of sediment sample
Loss on Ignition (by mass)
Sediment total carbon content (by dry mass)
Sediment organic carbon content (by dry mass)
Sediment inorganic carbon content (by dry mass)
Sediment nitrogen content (by dry mass)
Sediment phosphorus content (by dry mass)
Organic carbon stable isotope ratio relative to standard V-PDB
Category for method of organic carbon content determination: Measured=Determined on Elemental Analyzer, Predicted=Calculated from LOI using empirical formula derived from this dataset
Organic carbon density of core interval
Accumulative organic carbon density of all intervals within a core from the surface up to this interval
Additional information

unit.name: nominalMonth
unit.description: one month excluding leap seconds and leap days, 2628000 seconds
